title: Malad Assault and Robbery
description: A 34-year-old businessman was assaulted and robbed outside a Malad West restaurant at 11:30 PM. Three suspects attacked from behind, took cash, watch, and phone, and fled in a car. Victim sustained head injuries. Restaurant CCTV captured partial view of the car.
modus_operandi: Three-person team, ambush from behind, late night restaurant exit targeting, vehicle-assisted escape, opportunistic high-value victim.

suspects.description: Male, 5'7", physically executed assault, stocky build

evidence.description: Restaurant exterior camera captured partial plate of getaway car — MH-04
Victim injuries consistent with blunt force — fist and boot
Victim phone IMEI activated in Mira Road 6 hours after robbery

blind_spots: Victim phone IMEI not flagged until day 4
Restaurant staff not interviewed until day 3
No check on similar late-night assault pattern in Malad and Goregaon
resolution: Phone IMEI activation location led to suspect area. Informant identified suspect 1. All three arrested day 12.
